block_00: Ab Bhaarat me jama ke liye uplabdh hai.
block_04: Ab IQ Option par teen naye suvidhaajanak bhugtaan ke tarike uplabdh hain! Kuch saral charnoo me twarit aur surakshit prasansakaran ka aanand len.
block_06: UPI aur Rupay se jama kaise karen
block_07: 2 minute se kum samay me UPI ya Rupay ke saath jama karna seekhen.
block_09: 1. Apne IQ Option khaate me login karen aur jama anubhag par jayen.
block_10: 2. Jama raashi chune aur chayan karen NetBanking.
block_11: 3. Aapko praasangik bhugtaan prishth par nirdisht kar diya jaayega. Aawashyak jaankaari darj karen aur apne bhugtaan lenden ki pushti karen.
block_13: Hum aapke shaandaar trading anubhav ki kaamnaa karte hain.
